name: Alexandria Schools Employees
description_short: ASE Credit Union is a federally chartered, member-owned credit union established in 1954 serving Alabama state employees and surrounding communities with competitive checking, savings, loans, and mortgages.
description_long:
ASE Credit Union was established in 1954 as the Alabama State Employees' Credit Union and has evolved into a community-focused financial cooperative. Originally chartered to serve state employees, ASE later obtained a community charter, expanding membership to anyone living, working, worshipping, or attending school in the eight counties surrounding Montgomery, Alabama. Today, it operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative chartered under federal law with branches in Montgomery, Millbrook, Wetumpka, Prattville, Clanton, Greenville, and Selma.

ASE Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business financial products. Personal offerings include multiple checking account options (Kasasa Cash Checking, Kasasa Cash Back Checking, Your Rewards Checking, and ASE Checking), savings accounts (Regular Share, Club Account, Super Saver, Kasasa Saver), share certificates with competitive rates (currently 3.85% APY for 9 months or 3.55% APY for 15 months), individual retirement accounts, and lending products including personal loans, home mortgages, auto loans, and VISA credit cards. Business members can access business checking and business savings accounts with VISA debit cards and online banking capabilities.

ASE distinguishes itself through member-ownership benefits, emphasizing that "when the credit union wins you win" through profit-sharing with members. The institution advertises no monthly maintenance fees or minimum balance requirements on checking accounts, competitive rates compared to traditional banks, and 24/7 account access via online banking, mobile apps, and phone support. Members gain access to the CO-OP Shared Branch network and surcharge-free ATMs nationwide. Additionally, ASE offers member benefits including complimentary accidental death and dismemberment insurance, GAP advantage for auto loans, extended warranty programs, virtual health programs, and financial wellness services.

ASE Credit Union is well-suited for individuals with ties to Alabama's Montgomery area who value local banking relationships and member-ownership benefits. The institution's federal charter ensures NCUA insurance protection. However, membership is geographically limited to those meeting specific residency, employment, or school attendance criteria within eight surrounding counties, which restricts access for out-of-area consumers. As a regional credit union, it may have fewer technology features or product breadth compared to larger national institutions.
services: Kasasa Cash Checking account with rewards
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure means profits are returned to members as owners
Free checking accounts with no monthly maintenance fees or minimum balance requirements
24/7 account access through online banking, mobile app, and phone support
Access to nationwide CO-OP Shared Branch network and surcharge-free ATMs beyond local branches
Competitive share certificate rates (3.85% APY for 9 months as of website update)
Complimentary member benefits including accidental death insurance and financial wellness programs
NCUA federal insurance protection for deposits
Multiple checking account options with rewards programs (Kasasa Cash Back Checking, Your Rewards Checking)
cons: Membership restricted to those living, working, worshipping, or attending school in 8 counties surrounding Montgomery, Alabama—geographic limitation excludes most consumers
Limited branch network with only 7 physical locations, all in Alabama
Website content does not clearly specify loan rates, approval requirements, or detailed product terms
As a smaller regional credit union, may lack advanced digital features or product breadth of larger national institutions
Share certificate minimum opening deposit requirement of $500 may deter small savers
best_for: Alabama state employees and their families with ties to Montgomery-area counties
Local Montgomery-area residents seeking member-ownership benefits and personalized service
Business owners in the service area looking for no-frills business checking and savings
Individuals wanting to avoid bank fees through credit union membership
diagnosis: ASE Credit Union is best for Alabama residents within Montgomery's eight-county service area who value member-ownership, local banking relationships, and fee-free checking. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership restrictions that exclude anyone outside the designated service area, making this institution inaccessible to most consumers despite its solid product offerings and competitive rates.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Alexandria Schools Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in Alexandria, MN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
